description: A square designed 'LABOR NEWS' announcement card in DOL's branded template. Background photo shows wildfire devastation: the charred, gutted shell of a burned house with collapsed/blackened roof beams and a debris field of rubble and broken masonry in the foreground; at right a search/recovery worker in a dark jacket reading 'CALIFOR...' (California task force) with a red helmet and a long red probe/tool stands amid the wreckage. Overlaid is the small navy 'LABOR NEWS' tab and a bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks: 'Department of Labor approves up to $10M in initial funding to support disaster recovery, response to California's continuing wildfires.' A navy bar at lower right reads 'dol.gov/newsroom.' This is a designed news-promo graphic (not a candid photo), publicizing emergency Dislocated Worker Grant funding for the Los Angeles County wildfires. Messaging technique: branded disaster-response announcement showing the agency funding cleanup/recovery jobs; audience is the general public and affected communities. Posted Jan 17 2025, just before the Jan 20 inauguration, using the recurring DOL template.
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / Department of Labor approves up to $10M in initial funding to support disaster recovery, response to California's continuing wildfires / dol.gov/newsroom
